title: Pack of 6 Gingerbread Themed Christmas Crackers - 12" Design Kids Adults Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: Add a playful and festive touch to your holiday celebrations with this pack of six crackers, each featuring a charming gingerbread character design full of seasonal cheer and personality.
Accented with a shiny red hot-stamp finish and tied with a bold red ribbon, these crackers bring a delightful sparkle and a classic Christmas colour palette to your table setting.
Each 12-inch cracker contains a colourful party hat, a witty festive motto, and the traditional snap—delivering all the elements needed for a joyful Christmas experience.
Inside each cracker is a novelty gift to entertain guests of all ages, making these crackers perfect for family dinners, holiday parties, or festive gatherings with friends.
This sweet gingerbread-themed set combines traditional cracker fun with a modern, whimsical design—sure to bring smiles, laughter, and a magical atmosphere to your celebration.
description: Product Description Novelty Christmas Crackers Celebrate in style with Harvey & Mason Novelty Christmas Crackers, expertly crafted to bring elegance, sparkle, and festive fun to your table. Each set offers a luxurious design, classic tradition, and joyful surprises for family and friends to enjoy this holiday season. Crackers for Unforgettable Festive Moments Nutcracker Crackers for Classic Christmas Magic Six nutcracker-themed crackers with gold foil and ribbon ties, each with a hat, motto, snap and novelty gift. A fun, festive way to add sparkle and traditional charm to family meals or parties. Gingerbread Crackers for Sweet Seasonal Fun Six gingerbread character crackers finished with shiny red foil and ribbons. Each includes a hat, joke, snap and novelty gift, making them a playful and heartwarming addition to any festive gathering. Add Festive Flair and Joy with Christmas Crackers Script Crackers with Sparkle and Style Six colourful script crackers with gold foil accents and ribbon ties. Complete with hat, motto, snap and novelty gift, they bring festive sparkle and family fun to the Christmas table. Crackers to Suit Every Christmas Celebration From nutcracker magic to sweet gingerbread or sparkling script designs, these crackers bring festive flair, fun gifts and laughter to your table. Which set will you pick to make your Christmas extra memorable?
